meta.title: Webinar Content Repurposing - Pixelops
meta.description: Get unlimited access to our vetted team of graphic design experts. We turn businesses into unstoppable marketing machines.

hero.headline: Your Webinar Costs $5,000 to Produce. then generates leads for only 48 hours
hero.subheadline: PixelOps transforms your one-time webinar into 90 days of systematic lead generation—with professionally designed assets your team can deploy in minutes, not weeks.
hero.cta: Get your free webinar content audit

sections.heading: The Webinar Content Problem Every B2B Team Faces
sections.body: You know repurposing webinar content drives leads. Your team just doesn't have the bandwidth to do it consistently. Meanwhile, your webinar content contains everything you need: frameworks, case studies, and insights your prospects actually want. The gap isn't content quality. It's execution.
items: Your designer is booked 3 times out
Your marketing manager will get to it in the next quarter
Last webinar's recording has 47 views in your library
You're planning the next webinar while the last one generates zero ROI

sections.heading: Your Webinar Repurposing Engine—Delivered in 7 Days
sections.body: PixelOps is your dedicated design team for turning webinars into multi-platform content assets. In just 7 days, the team extracts the core insights, plans the content rollout, designs the asset suite, incorporates review feedback, and delivers publication-ready files.

sections.heading: The PixelOps Repurposing Suite: What You Get
sections.body: For every webinar, PixelOps delivers a complete package of branded, publication-ready design assets.
items: Premium Lead Magnet Guide: professionally designed 15–20 page PDF, editable Canva template, and suggested LinkedIn promotion copy
LinkedIn Carousel Sets: 2 carousel sets per webinar, 14–20 total slides, delivered as editable PowerPoint or Canva files
Social Media Post Graphics: 5 ready-to-publish graphics for LinkedIn, Twitter/X, and Instagram in multiple sizes
Short-Form Video Clips: 3–4 AI-generated video shorts with hardcoded captions in vertical and square formats

sections.heading: Why PixelOps Instead of Hiring In-House
sections.body: Your team focuses on running great webinars. PixelOps handles everything that happens after.
items: 7 business days, guaranteed
Never miss a webinar
Professional design, every time
$2,000 per webinar, no overhead
Best-practice repurposing recommendations

sections.heading: How B2B Teams Use PixelOps Content
items: SaaS Company (HR Tech): PixelOps produced 3 months of LinkedIn content from a Q4 webinar series and increased engagement from 2.1% to 8.3%. — Michael Torres, Director of Marketing
Professional Services Firm: A webinar lead magnet generated 186 downloads in its first month. — Jennifer Park, Head of Business Development
Professional Services Firm: PixelOps saved an internal designer 15–20 hours per webinar. — David Okonkwo, Creative Director

sections.heading: How It Works: From Recording to Published Content
sections.body: Timeline: 7 business days from submission to final delivery.
items: Submit Your Webinar: share the recording link and brand assets
Strategy Call (15 Minutes): align on goals, audience, and distribution
We Design: PixelOps extracts insights, maps content, and creates the asset suite
Review & Revisions: review all assets with one included revision round
Final Delivery: organized files by format and platform, plus usage recommendations

sections.heading: Pricing & Packages
sections.body: Three packages cover single webinars, recurring monthly programs, and enterprise quarterly programs.
items: Single Webinar Package — $2,000/webinar
Monthly Retainer — $5,000/month
Quarterly Package — $14,000/quarter

sections.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
sections.body: Questions cover webinar length, brand matching, rush delivery, publishing, video formats, featured insights, panel discussions, strategy services, and repurposing archived webinars.
items: What if our webinars vary in length—some are 30 minutes, others 90 minutes?
Can you match our existing brand guidelines precisely?
What if we need content faster than 7 days?
Do you handle the actual posting/publishing for us?
What video formats do you provide?
Can we request specific insights to be featured?
What if we run panel discussions or interviews instead of solo presentations?
Do you offer content strategy/planning services?
Can you repurpose older webinars from our archive?

sections.heading: See the PixelOps Difference (For Free)
sections.body: Send one webinar recording and PixelOps will analyze it and create a free sample asset—a carousel mock-up, PDF excerpt, or video clip concept. There is no cost or obligation, and you keep the mock-up.
items: See the design quality using your actual content
Evaluate whether the ROI justifies the investment
Experience the communication style before committing
sections.cta: Get my free webinar content audit
